title: EmailReputationDetails
description: Detailed intelligence signals about the email address and its domain.

blacklisted.description: The email is believed to be malicious or spammy.

malicious_activity.description: The email has exhibited malicious behavior (e.g. phishing or fraud).

malicious_activity_recent.description: Malicious behavior observed within the last 90 days.

credentials_leaked.description: Credentials for the email were leaked at some point (data breach, paste, dark web, etc.).

credentials_leaked_recent.description: Credentials were leaked within the last 90 days.

data_breach.description: The email appeared in a known data breach.

first_seen.description: First date the email was observed in a breach, credential leak, or exhibiting malicious or spammy behavior. `never` if never seen.

last_seen.description: Last date the email was observed in a breach, credential leak, or exhibiting malicious or spammy behavior. `never` if never seen.

domain_exists.description: Whether the email's domain is a valid, resolvable domain.

domain_reputation.description: Reputation verdict for the email's domain. `n/a` when the domain is a free provider, disposable, or does not exist.

new_domain.description: The domain was registered within the last year.

days_since_domain_creation.description: Days since the domain was created.

suspicious_tld.description: The domain uses a top-level domain associated with abuse.

spam.description: The email has exhibited spammy behavior (e.g. spam traps, login form abuse).

free_provider.description: The email uses a free email provider (e.g. Gmail, Yahoo, Outlook).

disposable.description: The email uses a temporary or disposable provider.

deliverable.description: The address is deliverable based on SMTP probes and MX checks.

accept_all.description: The mail server has a default accept-all policy.

valid_mx.description: The domain has a valid MX record.

spoofable.description: The email address can be spoofed (e.g. SPF is not strict or DMARC is not enforced).

spf_strict.description: SPF record is sufficiently strict to prevent spoofing.

dmarc_enforced.description: DMARC is configured correctly and enforced.

profiles.description: Online profiles where the email has been observed.
